items.name: auth-sign-in
items.title: Auth Sign In
items.description: Composable shadcn-style sign-in block with social providers, magic link, and email/password forms.

meta.a11y: Semantic form controls, visible focus states, and reduced-motion-aware interactions.

items.name: auth-sign-up
items.title: Auth Sign Up
items.description: Composable sign-up block with field-level validation, async submit handling, and API-friendly payload callbacks.

meta.a11y: Semantic labels, field-level error messages, and keyboard-friendly controls.

items.name: cta-banner
items.title: CTA Banner
items.description: Full-width call-to-action banner with configurable message and action.

meta.a11y: Button action remains keyboard operable with clear text contrast.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: Server-driven data table with debounced search, sorting, pagination, iconized row actions, and edit/delete integration hooks.

meta.a11y: Keyboard-accessible controls, icon action labels, and inline error states for row actions.

items.name: hero-split
items.title: Hero Split
items.description: Two-column marketing hero with CTAs and benefit highlights.

meta.a11y: Semantic heading and keyboard-accessible action buttons.

items.name: saas-audit-timeline
items.title: SaaS Audit Timeline
items.description: Chronological audit event timeline for security and compliance visibility.

meta.a11y: Ordered timeline semantics and contrast-safe severity indicators.

items.name: saas-billing-overview
items.title: SaaS Billing Overview
items.description: Plan, invoice, and usage overview panel for subscription SaaS admin consoles.

meta.a11y: Readable billing summary and usage progress with text alternatives.

items.name: saas-command-center
items.title: SaaS Command Center
items.description: Searchable command launcher for common backoffice actions and admin workflows.

meta.a11y: Keyboard-focusable command buttons and labeled command search field.

items.name: saas-integrations-grid
items.title: SaaS Integrations Grid
items.description: Integration catalog cards for connecting and configuring SaaS ecosystem tools.

meta.a11y: Clear action buttons and text labels for integration states.

items.name: saas-kpi-grid
items.title: SaaS KPI Grid
items.description: Analytics KPI cards for SaaS dashboards with trend indicators and sparklines.

meta.a11y: Semantic section headings and numeric values with tabular alignment.

items.name: saas-notification-inbox
items.title: SaaS Notification Inbox
items.description: Filtered operations inbox for SaaS notifications, incidents, and billing events.

meta.a11y: Filter controls and clear read state labels for notification triage.

items.name: saas-settings-sections
items.title: SaaS Settings Sections
items.description: Structured settings overview cards for identity, security, and workspace configuration.

meta.a11y: Section labels and status indicators with keyboard-accessible actions.

items.name: saas-team-roster
items.title: SaaS Team Roster
items.description: Team access roster for member lifecycle, role, and security coverage.

meta.a11y: Accessible team actions and status labels for user lifecycle state.

items.name: sidebar-navigation
items.title: Sidebar Navigation
items.description: Composable sidebar with groups, nested menus, icon collapse mode, and motion-based active highlight.

meta.a11y: Uses explicit button semantics, reduced-motion support, and keyboard-focusable controls.
